error_signature: Invalid credentials error when creating Gmail credentials
title: Gmail credentials invalid due to app status
symptom: Users encounter an invalid credentials error when trying to create Gmail credentials after a recent change in app status.
applies_when: App status is set to Testing
not_this_if: App status is already set to Production
root_cause: When the app's Publishing status is set to Testing, it restricts the use of credentials, leading to errors when trying to authenticate or create new credentials. Changing the status to Production resolves this issue.
fix_steps: Go to the Google Cloud Console
Change the app's Publishing status from Testing to Production
Try creating the Gmail credentials again
agent_instruction: Change the app's Publishing status to Production in the Google Cloud Console.
